prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2022年最低位次约12291名，2023年大幅上升至约7994名（竞争加剧），2024年出现异常断档跌至约61000名（数据异常，不反映正常趋势）。近两年正常年份基 准约7994-12291名，2023年为最近可用正常基准约7994名；2022-2024年本省理科计划均为26人，2026年物理类计划仍为26人，招生规模连续多年持平， 对竞争格局无显著影响。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211工程、双一流建设高校，军队院校体系内顶尖医科院校；软科主榜未进入前200名（军事类院校不参与排名），但学校在医学领域享 有较高声誉；抖音平台综合热度排名第9（高热），综合热度约532万，短视频曝光量高，反映考生关注度持续升温，可能加剧竞争。声誉文件中未见该校明显负 面舆情；但该校作为海军最高医学学府，临床医学、药学等为传统优势方向。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 临床医学专业2022-202 4年持续高热推荐，医学类专业整体报考热度高；本省2026年普通高考总人数约53.5万，按历史比例估算物理类考生约30.5万人，较2025年物理类28.5万人增加约7%，考生规模扩大加剧竞 争。2025年物理类特殊类型招生控制线518分。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2023年正常位次基准约7994名、2026年招生计划持平、本省考生规模扩大约7%、抖音高热 反映关注度上升等因素，预计2026年竞争较2023年略有加剧。考虑2024年断档后报考心理修复及医学类专业持续高热，预测最低位次约8300名，区间7800-8800名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:

- 麻醉学（临床麻醉医师）

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间7800-8800名内，建议以二档专业为主力填报、一档王牌专业冲刺、三档专业保底。若位次明显优于区间下限（如7500名以内），可重点冲击临床医学八年制等一 档专业；若位次接近区间上限，建议优先考虑二档专业并确保三档保底。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: In 2022, the minimum ranking was approximately 12,291; in 2023, it rose significantly to about 7,994 (intensified competition); in 2024, an abnormal gap occurred, dropping to about 61,000 (data anomaly, not reflecting normal trends). The normal baseline in recent years is approximately 7,994-12,291, with 2023 being the most recent usable normal baseline of about 7,994; from 2022 to 2024, the provincial science enrollment plan was 26 students, and the 2026 physics category plan remains 26 students, with enrollment scale unchanged for many consecutive years, having no significant impact on the competitive landscape.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university, a top medical institution within the military academy system; it did not enter the top 200 in the Soft Science main ranking (military academies are not included in the ranking), but the school enjoys a high reputation in the medical field; on the Douyin platform, it ranks 9th in comprehensive popularity (high heat), with a comprehensive popularity of about 5.32 million, high short video exposure, reflecting increasing attention from candidates, which may intensify competition. No significant negative public opinion about the school was found in reputation documents; however, as the highest medical academy of the Navy, clinical medicine and pharmacy are traditional advantageous directions.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The clinical medicine major has been consistently recommended as high-heat from 2022 to 2024, with overall high application heat for medical majors; in 2026, the total number of ordinary college entrance examination candidates in the province is about 535,000, with an estimated 305,000 physics category candidates based on historical proportions, an increase of about 7% compared to 285,000 physics category candidates in 2025, with the expansion of candidate scale intensifying competition. In 2025, the special type enrollment control score for physics category was 518 points.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering factors such as the normal baseline ranking of about 7,994 in 2023, the unchanged enrollment plan in 2026, the expansion of provincial candidate scale by about 7%, and the high Douyin heat reflecting increased attention, competition in 2026 is expected to be slightly more intense than in 2023. Taking into account the psychological repair after the 2024 gap and the sustained high heat of medical majors, the predicted minimum ranking is about 8,300, with a range of 7,800-8,800.

- Clinical Medicine (Clinical Physician Five-Year Program)
- Anesthesiology (Clinical Anesthesiologist)

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:

- Nursing (Nurse)
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 7,800-8,800, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, sprint for Tier 1 flagship majors, and use Tier 3 majors as safety options. If the ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 7,500), focus on sprinting for Tier 1 majors such as Clinical Medicine Eight-Year Program; if the ranking is close to the upper limit of the range, it is recommended to prioritize Tier 2 majors and ensure Tier 3 safety options.
